---
title: "dashboard"
---

This page highlights dashboard and data visualization work completed throughout the semester using Quarto, RStudio, and Tableau.

The purpose of these projects was to organize and present data in a way that makes trends, patterns, and marketing insights easier to understand.

## Dashboard Features

- Interactive visualizations
- Marketing analytics insights
- Trend analysis
- Data storytelling
- Organized reporting layouts

## Tools Used

- Quarto
- RStudio
- Tableau
- Excel
- Google Analytics 4

## Example Work

Examples of dashboard and visualization projects include coursework focused on marketing analytics, reporting, and visual presentation of data.

::: {.card}
### Marketing Analytics Dashboards

These dashboards focused on organizing and visualizing marketing data to better identify trends, audience behavior, and performance insights.

**Tools Used:** Quarto, Tableau, RStudio, Excel
:::

::: {.card}
### Data Visualization Skills

Projects throughout the semester emphasized data storytelling, dashboard organization, trend analysis, and visual communication techniques used in marketing analytics.
:::

::: {.card}
### Interactive Reporting

Using Quarto and Tableau allowed for the creation of interactive and visually organized reports that improved readability and presentation of insights.
:::
